ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the person */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the person */,
  "preferred_title" TEXT /* Preferred title of the person */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the person's research and professional contributions */,
  "individual_url" TEXT /* URL to the person's individual profile or external academic database */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location or building */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Detailed research interests */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background and degrees */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A more detailed biography or CV */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the person's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person holding the position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the position is held */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute where the position is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position (if applicable) */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., full-time, part-time, adjunct) */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Academic rank (e.g., assistant, associate, full professor) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES personnel ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's focus and responsibilities */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the department */,
  "head_of_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department (foreign key to `personnel`) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department_id") REFERENCES personnel ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institute's focus and responsibilities */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the institute */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the institute (foreign key to `personnel`) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutes_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES personnel ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who achieved it */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., award, grant, publication) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the achievement */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or description of the achievement */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the achievement was awarded or published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to more information or the publication */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the achievement (e.g., research, teaching, service) */,
  "grant_amount" TEXT /* Amount of grant (if applicable) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization awarding the achievement */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* List of co-authors (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES personnel ("person_id")
)
